data.title: RetinalGenix Technologies expands patent portfolio for remote monitoring, shaping future of disease care.
data.description: RetinalGenix Technologies has made significant progress in enhancing its patent portfolio for home and remote monitoring, a crucial step towards the evolution of ocular and systemic disease care. This advancement underscores the company's commitment to innovation and improving healthcare outcomes. The updated patent portfolio now includes a total of 15 patents, signaling a substantial increase in intellectual property protection. This move prepares RetinalGenix Technologies for the rapidly changing landscape of healthcare technology and positions them as a key player in the future of disease management.

data.title: Marginum's HIVEN® device for neurosurgery receives CE mark in record time, bringing cutting-edge tech to EU clinics.
data.description: Marginum, a company based in Kuopio, Finland, has recently acquired MDR certification for their latest innovation, the HIVEN® device. This pioneering technology is now available for clinical use in the European Union. This marks a significant milestone for Marginum as they introduce this first-of-a-kind device to the market.

data.title: STEP Energy Services Ltd. gets $5.50 per share offer for complete acquisition from ARC Financial Corp.; offer extends to 100% shares.
data.description: STEP Energy Services Ltd. has recently shared that a non-binding offer has been received from ARC Financial Corp. The offer involves the potential acquisition of all the common shares of STEP not currently under ARC's ownership, at a price of $5.50 per share in cash. This purchase would cover 100% of the issued and outstanding shares held by entities outside of ARC's control. Additionally, it is specified that ARC already holds a significant portion of STEP's common shares, either directly or indirectly.

data.title: Lido DAO price hovers around $1.08 support, RSI at 39.13 indicating potential oversold conditions. Key levels in focus.

Traders are closely watching key support levels as they come into focus amid the market fluctuations.

data.title: Dogwifhat price dips 4.76% to $0.76, near vital support amid bearish trend on Solana memecoin. Technicals hint at further decline.
data.description: The price of WIF has declined by 4.76% to $0.76, nearing critical support levels. Technical analysis suggests a persistent downward trend for the meme cryptocurrency based on Solana.

data.title: Emera Inc. ups quarterly dividend to $0.7325 per share, making the annual dividend $2.93, up 1% from prior $2.90, reflecting 19 years of growth.
data.description: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, Emera Inc. (TSX: EMA) has announced a rise in its quarterly dividend on common shares to $0.7325 per share approved by the Board of Directors. This new quarterly dividend equates to an annualized dividend of $2.93, up by 1% compared to the previous annual dividend of $2.90 per share. This increase signifies the 19th consecutive year in which Emera has elevated its dividend, demonstrating their commitment to providing steady and sustainable returns.

data.title: Marti Technologies added to S&P Global BMI on Sept 22, 2025. Boost for Turkey's mobility app as it advances in the market.
data.description: In Istanbul, Marti Technologies, Inc. ("Marti" or the "Company") revealed its entry into the S&P Global Broad Market Index ("S&P Global BMI") on September 22, 2025. As Türkiye's prominent mobility super app, Marti's inclusion in the index, under the ticker symbol NYSE American: MRT, signifies a significant achievement for the company. Oguz Alper Oktem, Founder, expressed enthusiasm stating, "Being part of the S&P Global BMI is a crucial step for Marti as we strengthen our presence in the ride-hailing sector, expand our operations, and enhance revenue generation."

data.title: HBAR price falls by 4.7% to $0.21 amid conflicting signals: RSI signals oversold condition, but MACD is bearish.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Hedera (HBAR) is currently trading at $0.21, representing a 4.66% decrease. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates oversold conditions, hinting at a possible rebound, despite the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) showing a bearish trend.

data.title: Pure Storage enhances Platform for AI initiatives, unifying data access. Expands workload coverage into cloud. (Characters: 106)
data.description: Updates to the Pure Storage Platform have been introduced to increase accessibility of data across various locations, including expansion into the cloud. This announcement was made during Pure//Accelerate event in New York on September 25, 2025. Pure Storage®, a leading IT company listed on NYSE as PSTG, is known for providing cutting-edge data solutions.

data.title: Top 5 metros showing highest number of mortgaged homeowners are Washington D.C., Denver, Virginia Beach, Raleigh, and Seattle.
data.description: Washington D.C., Denver, CO, Virginia Beach, VA, Raleigh, NC, and Seattle, WA are the top 5 metropolitan areas with the largest proportion of homeowners with mortgages. According to reports from AUSTIN, Texas, on September 25, 2025, mortgage rates have now fallen to around 6% after the Federal Reserve's most recent actions.
